claim: Minime's ESN has source-prepared, non-live hooks for testing adaptive pressure, dynamic-noise pressure room, and viscous rho target policies before integration into `ESN::step`.
authority: read-only/source-prepared review hooks; not live ESN policy

claim: Entropy near `ADAPTIVE_INTROSPECTION_VOLATILE_ENTROPY=0.85` can risk chatter if pressure threshold and rho target edges are not continuous.
authority: test/source verification only; no live threshold change

claim: `dynamic_noise_pressure_room_review_v1` should classify the requested mid-pressure, gentle-gradient case as `gentle_pressure_room_slope` and preserve smoothed pressure room above linear pressure room.
authority: read-only review packet; no exploration-noise runtime change

claim: `calculate_viscous_rho_target` should keep high-entropy, low-gradient rho targets within the viscous floor and ceiling.
authority: source-prepared review only; no live rho controller change

claim: Pressure-room transition logic should avoid dead zones at the start edge and fallback states.
authority: test/source verification only; no live ESN behavior changed
